name: type:bug
description: Incorrect behavior, crash, or data-integrity defect

name: type:refactor
description: Internal design change without intended user-facing behavior change

name: type:chore
description: Maintenance, dependency, tooling, or repository task

name: priority:p0
description: Data loss, crash, invalid release, or broken delivery pipeline

name: priority:p1
description: Core reliability, architecture blocker, or incorrect result

name: area:governance
description: Issues, pull requests, documentation, and project management

name: status:ready
description: Meets Definition of Ready and may enter implementation

name: status:needs-review
description: Ready for manual review or validation

name: status:blocked
description: Cannot progress because of a dependency

name: risk:data-migration
description: May change or migrate persisted user data

name: risk:breaking-change
description: May break compatibility or existing behavior

name: risk:performance
description: Requires performance measurement or has performance risk

name: risk:privacy
description: Touches private data or privacy behavior
